title: Implosion No Bomb
description: A simple GCYM's addon that removes the need for explosives in the Electric Implosion Compressor
body:
Implosion No Bomb (INB) is a simple addon for Gregicality Multiblocks (GCYM).

In gregicality-legacy, an addon for GTCE, the Electric Implosion Compressor (EIC) did not require explosives, whereas the EIC in GCYM does. This mod makes the EIC function like it did in gregicality-legacy, eliminating the need for explosives.
